name: block_equivocated
description: Two different blocks (different block ids) were observed for the same slot. Emitted once when the validator first detects the equivocation, after both blocks are known.

bank_seq.description: Sequence number of this validator's replayed block, joining to block_completed; zero if there is no local replayed bank (forward-confirmed or shred-proof detection).

slot.description: The slot that equivocates (has more than one block).

parent_slot.description: The slot number of the parent block.

epoch.description: The epoch this slot belongs to.

block_id.description: Identifier of the block this validator replayed for the slot.

sibling_block_id.description: Identifier of the conflicting block for the same slot; zero if not known (shred-proof detection).

bank_hash.description: This validator's bank hash for the block it replayed; zero if the block was not replayed locally.

block_hash.description: Last microblock header hash of the block this validator replayed; zero if not replayed locally.

is_leader.description: Whether this validator produced the equivocating block it replayed.

our_block_voted.description: Whether this validator had voted for its replayed block when the equivocation was detected.

our_block_confirmed.description: Whether this validator's replayed block had been duplicate confirmed when the equivocation was detected.

block_stake.description: Stake in lamports voted on the block this validator replayed at detection; zero if none/unknown. Typically small, as an equivocating block usually did not win confirmation.

sibling_stake.description: Stake in lamports on the conflicting (typically confirmed) block at detection; zero if not known.

total_stake.description: Total cluster stake in lamports at detection; the denominator for the stake fields. Zero if not known.

duplicate_replay.description: A second, different block for the slot finished replaying locally.

confirm_mismatch.description: Votes confirmed a block id for the slot that differs from the one this validator replayed.

shred_proof.description: A duplicate-shred proof showed the slot equivocates; the conflicting block id is not known, so sibling_block_id is zero.
